goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'the lensfield hotel'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'area'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '04:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called the lensfield hotel
Make sure you get whether they have internet and area
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 04:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
